name: Western Metals Ltd
description: Western Metals Limited was an Australian-based mining and exploration company that focused on base metal operations. The company historically operated significant mining assets, including the Lennard Shelf complex in the Kimberley region of Western Australia and the Hellyer Mine in Tasmania. As a multi-metal producer, it maintained interests in various mining projects across Australia, Tanzania, and Canada. The company has since been delisted from the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), marking the end of its tenure as a publicly traded entity in the Australian mining sector.
